chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal Nos. 102 & 103 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on main case. 2. For hearing on CMA No. 768/22. 01.12.2025 Mr. Sahar Shahid, advocate holding brief for Mr. Ayan M. Memon, advocate for appellants. Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for respondents along with M/s. Zeshan Ahmed, Kumail Abbas and Aftab Ali, advocates. Mr. Kashif Hanif, advocate for respondent. Mr. Raja Lov Kush, Deputy Manager (Legal) SSGC. Ms. Zehrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General. These matters are pending since 2022 without any progress. Today, brief is being held and time is being sought on behalf of the appellants for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the appellants are not interested in proceeding with these appeals, therefore, the same are dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
